title: TN Paramedical Counselling 2026 Application Date

detail.title: TN Paramedical Counselling 2026 Application Date
detail.short_info: TN Paramedical Counselling 2026 application date is expected to be announced shortly. Check important dates, eligibility, registration process, fees and official website tnmedicalselection.net for B.Sc Nursing, B.Pharm, BPT and other paramedical courses.

content.text: TN Paramedical Counselling 2026 Application Date is expected to be announced soon by the Directorate of Medical Education and Research (DMER), Tamil Nadu. The official website tnmedicalselection.net will release the complete schedule, including registration dates for Paramedical Degree courses.

TN Paramedical Counselling is the centralized single-window admission process conducted by the Directorate of Medical Education and Research, Tamil Nadu for admission to various Paramedical Degree courses in government and private colleges across Tamil Nadu.

items: Conducting Body: Directorate of Medical Education and Research (DMER), Tamil Nadu
Courses Offered: B.Sc. Nursing, B.Pharm, B.P.T, B.O.T, B.ASLP, B.Sc. Radiology & Imaging Technology, and many other paramedical courses
Admission Basis: Merit based on Class 12 marks

content.text: Action Point: Regularly visit the official website for the latest notification on TN Paramedical Counselling 2026 application date.

rows: Passed Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry & Biology
Tamil Nadu domicile required for government seats

content.text: Check the official prospectus for course-wise detailed eligibility.

How to Apply for TN Paramedical Counselling 2026 (Step-by-Step)

items: Click on the Paramedical Degree Courses 2026 registration link
